
private const string LogsEntityName = "tpc_logs";
private const string LogNameField = "tpc_name";
private const string EmailCreatedField = "tpc_emailcreated";
private const string FormattedMessageField = "tpc_formattedmessage";
private const string ProcessNameField = "tpc_processname";
private const string LogTypeField = "tpc_logtype";


var logEntity = new Microsoft.Xrm.Sdk.Entity(LogsEntityName);

logEntity[LogNameField] = request.LogErrorTitle;
logEntity[EmailCreatedField] = request.SendErrorEmail;
logEntity[FormattedMessageField] = request.LogErrorFormattedError;
logEntity[ProcessNameField] = request.LogErrorProcessName;

if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.LogType) && int.TryParse(request.LogType, out int parsedLogType))
{
    logEntity[LogTypeField] = new Microsoft.Xrm.Sdk.OptionSetValue(parsedLogType);
}
